examples: In many such cases, he uses bifurcation to express a kind of fervor or even a fury that's comparable to the moral denunciations he criticizes.
Any of my dog's sad eyes always stirs the fervor in my heart.
Never be lacking in zeal, but keep your spiritual fervor, serving the Lord.
In the inflationary blowup of the late 1970s, diamonds were the subject of considerable investment fervor.
In fact, who is an employee and why it matters can take on nearly religious fervor.
